class.name: CassieCurvenet
class.brief_description: Graph of Bézier curves layered over a [CassieSurfacePatch] — Pixar's curvenet primitive.
class.description: Constructed from a sketch-graph dictionary via [method build_from_graph]. Each graph node becomes a [CassieCurvenetKnot]; nodes of degree ≥ 3 are flagged as intersections. [method compute_orientations] runs the Pixar §3 algorithm to produce surface-aligned manipulator transforms with zero manual setup.

method.name: build_from_graph
method.description: Build curves and knots from a sketch-graph dictionary with keys [code]"curves"[/code] (an array of [CassieFinalStroke]) and [code]"nodes"[/code] (an array of dictionaries with [code]"id"[/code], [code]"position"[/code], [code]"incident_curve_ids"[/code]).

method.name: compute_orientations
method.description: Run the Pixar Curvenet Adjuster Mover algorithm on every knot, populating [member CassieCurvenetKnot.rest_pose_transform].

method.name: update_rest_pose
method.description: Re-project every knot onto the patch and refresh its rest-pose origin. Does not recompute orientations — call [method compute_orientations] afterwards.

members.member: Edit mode (wireframe authoring) vs Pose mode (knot transforms).

constants.constant: Edit mode — UI surfaces draw / delete / replace curve controls.
Pose mode — UI surfaces translate / rotate / scale gizmos on every knot.
